event: Procession of figures in a garden
description: A wide horizontal painting showing a procession of figures in ancient Greco-Roman dress moving from left to right through a sunlit grove of olive and deciduous trees. A large group of adults and children walks together, some gesturing ahead, others conversing. The figures wear white, blue, green, and brown robes and tunics. Children in shorter garments walk among the adults. On the far right, a figure in white welcomes the arriving group, while in the background, more figures and possibly tents are visible through the trees.
